body_html:
i have 300 yamahas

--- Darren dkiesq@aol.com wrote:

FYI
Sent wirelessly via BlackBerry from T-Mobile.

-----Original Message-----
From: "Craig" Craig@penumbramarine.com
Date: Mon, 27 Feb 2006 11:09:29
To:dkiesq@aol.com
Subject: RE: RIB

Darren,

We are looking into the 3 300 Yamahas. So far, they
are saying 52 knots
(almost 60mph) with a full load of water, fuel and 5
passengers. We are
looking into setting up a test ride for JE with the
Broward Sheriff Office.
The company is also building one for the Navy right
now that is very fast
but no cabin (less weight). I'm also checking on the
possibility of Carbon
fiber or Kevlar to decrease the weight and increase
speed. JE also requires
A/C which may require inboards.

The 300hp Yamahas require high test gasoline. Can
you get that at the docks
in VI?

Regards,

Craig Tafoya

Penumbra Marine Logistics
(954) 791-9992 Office
(954) 328-6203 Mobile
-----Original Message-----
From: Darren [mailto:dkiesq@aol.com]
Sent: Sunday, February 26, 2006 2:54 PM
To: Craig@PenumbraMarine.com
Subject: Re: RIB

Any place in vi or NY jee can see this boat?
Sent wirelessly via BlackBerry from T-Mobile.

-----Original Message-----
From: "Craig" Craig@penumbramarine.com
Date: Fri, 24 Feb 2006 18:37:19
To:dkiesq@aol.com
Subject: RE: RIB

Darren,

One of the attachments was labeled 41 Cabin Specs.
Here it is again just in
case...

Regards,

Craig Tafoya

Penumbra Marine Logistics
(954) 791-9992 Office
(954) 328-6203 Mobile

-----Original Message-----
From: Darren [mailto:dkiesq@aol.com]
Sent: Friday, February 24, 2006 6:19 PM
To: Craig@PenumbraMarine.com
Subject: Re: RIB

If you are interested ill get specs also.
Sent wirelessly via BlackBerry from T-Mobile.

-----Original Message-----
From: "Craig" Craig@penumbramarine.com
Date: Fri, 24 Feb 2006 17:01:19
To:DKIEsq@aol.com
Subject: RIB

Darren,

 

See if this looks like something JE is talking
about.  It is proven to do 55
mph fully loaded.

 

Regards,

 

Craig Tafoya

 

Penumbra Marine Logistics

(954) 791-9992 Office

(954) 328-6203 Mobile
